General.Name: Success Dragon International Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Success Dragon International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in processing and trading of gold and precious metals in Hong Kong, Macau, and the People's Republic of China. The company is involved in the extraction of gold and other precious metals from gold-laden carbon and gold ore. Success Dragon International Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1994 and is based in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Guangdong Finance Building, Sheung Wan, Hong Kong
